title: Youtube video generation pipeline from prompt
description: Generates videos for youtube Channel <CHANNEL>. Uses Prompt in the Block.

blocks.description: Get a text from OpenAI Chat Completion API

input.system_prompt: You must look for Historical event ( use google ) which happened today years ago. Write a short story about it. Add some interesting facts and make it engaging. The story MUST BE 30 words long!!!!!!!!
input.user_prompt: What happened years ago at date October 23 ?

blocks.description: Send the Event Text to Telegram for moderation
Fetch the Event Text moderation decision from Telegram
